framework.name: Five-Part Integration Taxonomy
framework.description: Read-only analytics → simulation/intent generation → delegated execution → autonomous signing → multi-agent workflows. This is the maturity ladder for agent-blockchain integration, and 'delegated execution' is exactly the constrained envelope pattern.
framework.raw_quote: a five-part taxonomy of integration patterns spanning read-only analytics, simulation and intent generation, delegated execution, autonomous signing, and multi-agent workflows

source.title: Autonomous Agents on Blockchains: Standards, Execution Models, and ...
